<!-- indicator: fig-cost-burdened-renters -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-cost-burdened-renters
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Cost Burdened Renter Occupied Units, 2021–2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Percentage of Cost Burdened Renter Occupied Units, 2021–2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-cost-burdened-renters", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
